_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 06:22 UTC tick — 1 unconsumed event (GOLD level_enter gold_escalation_buy_zone RE-FIRE at 4781.765, 15 min after 06:07 fire). SKIPPED AGAIN same thesis: still no M15 bull BOS, gold still -0.79% day, market still pricing DEAL optimism into T-0 binary. NEW intel from Apr 21 web scan: US Navy SEIZED Iranian-flagged vessel defying Hormuz blockade over weekend — Tehran vowed retaliation (NPR/Axios/EBM). Iran MFA spokesman Baghaei says US 'violated ceasefire from beginning' citing blockade since Apr 13 + vessel seizure. Talks sticking points: enrichment + Hormuz long-term status, BOTH unresolved. Vance departs Tuesday morning. Escalation signals STRONGER than 15 min ago (vessel + retaliation vow) but gold tape still shows deal-optimism compression. Gold note refreshed with vessel intel. Other alerts unchanged — same binary, same conv. 1 alert MODIFIED (gold note), 4 KEEP (audusd/usdjpy/oil/usdcad). Structure_watch KEEP 9, news queries KEEP 8.

level_alerts.note: Break of 0.707 = prior pivot gone. Short on retest from below. SL 0.713, TP 0.700. Risk-off + AUD first-to-bleed. Catalyst MIXED Apr 21 06:07 UTC (corrected): ceasefire expires TODAY, Vance/Witkoff/Kushner flying Islamabad, supreme leader cleared delegates at last minute — market pricing DEAL optimism (USD bid, gold -0.79%). Risk-off trigger requires TALKS COLLAPSE tonight (Iran vowed retaliation for seized tanker). Level 0.707 is ~1.1% below current 0.7178 — requires real catalyst not just drift. Need M15 bear BOS + rejection wick on retest. Conv 2 (was 3 — catalyst not ratifying on Tue).

Break 158.50 = risk-off yen flight AND aligns w/ MoF pain threshold 158 (FXEmpire/MUFG Apr 16). Short on retest from below. Catalyst MIXED Apr 21 06:07 UTC (corrected from 'RATIFIED'): ceasefire expires TODAY but Vance/Witkoff/Kushner flying Islamabad, last-minute Iran clearance — market pricing DEAL optimism (USD bid ON, gold -0.79%, DXY bouncing). Yen flight requires TALKS COLLAPSE or retaliation on seized tanker. If deal optimism holds, USDJPY floats — no reason for 158.50 break. SL 159.20, TP 157.00. Conv 3 (was 4 — catalyst not ratifying today).

WTI $88.26 (CNBC Apr 21 -1.51%), Brent $94.87 (-0.68%), broker shows WTI $86.24 bearish M15. Oil FADING Tue on peace-talk optimism, NOT +6% as prior tick. NEW Apr 21: US Navy SEIZED Iranian vessel weekend, Tehran vowed retaliation; Iran MFA calls US already in violation (blockade + seizure).
